overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character traverses a wet sidewalk beneath elevated highways and crosses a busy intersection surrounded by futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing medical facilities and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the camera on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support columns
yellow and blue illuminated medical cross sign on building facade
metal safety barriers separating sidewalk from street traffic
brightly lit commercial signs and holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. A prominent medical cross sign marks a facility on the left while neon advertisements glow on the right. Sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles share the cyberpunk urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with neon signage

events.description: exiting the covered medical district sidewalk and entering the open intersection crosswalk area
stepping onto the yellow striped crosswalk markings to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection crosswalk while avoiding oncoming pedestrians and observing the surrounding neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking toward the camera against the flow
group of pedestrians crossing the intersection in the distance

entered.detail: large red neon sign with 'Diamond' text mounted on building facade
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall cyberpunk architecture with illuminated windows and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the medical district into a wider intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes. The Diamond neon sign becomes prominent on the left as pedestrian density increases. The character navigates through opposing foot traffic while crossing the wet asphalt intersection beneath the persistent elevated highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that gradually opens into a bustling city intersection. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, passing a medical cross sign and glowing neon advertisements. As the character moves forward, the narrow corridor expands into a wider intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes. The scene then shifts toward a more crowded environment where the Diamond neon sign becomes prominent on the left and pedestrian density increases. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they navigate through opposing foot traffic while crossing the wet asphalt beneath the persistent shadow of the highway structure.
